item.name: Shooting Star
item.description:
One's chances of seeing an actual shooting star are greater than that of being able to observe one of these rare wavekin in its natural habitat.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: These fish were once a common sight in Eorzean waters, but are now on the brink of extinction in the wake of the Seventh Umbral Calamity. Originally named by the Sahagin, their scarcity now lends itself to this moniker now widely used in the fishing community.
